text: I feel a quiet anticipation as I move from a cold, sterile corridor into a vivid, stimulating exhibition. The contrast between the ordered glass meeting room and the dynamic R+D display draws my mind to the tension between structure and creativity. Here, among words about research and innovation, I feel contemplative—aware both of the human drive to understand and the quiet solitude of being an observer, slightly detached yet deeply curious about the unfolding story of progress.
